title: Peyote Plant - Sasquatch
popupHtml:
Peyote Plant - Sasquatch

On the cliff edge. To turn into Bigfoot, you must eat this between 3am and 8am while the weather is foggy. Otherwise you'll turn into a random land animal/bird.
